pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate Core from version 5.4.15.Final to 6.1.3.Final and switch groupId to org.hibernate.orm.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate 6.x requires Jakarta EE namespaces (jakarta.persistence) instead of Java EE (javax.persistence). Using Hibernate 5.x with code migrated to Jakarta EE (implied by the 'switch to jakarta' commit) would result in compile errors due to missing javax.persistence classes or runtime errors due to namespace mismatches.
